/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/system_monitor.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/system_monitor.dir/system_monitor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system_monitor.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o system_monitor  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.3
